name: French Onion Soup (Great Chefs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onions to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are clear.
3. Add thyme and bay leaves; continue cooking until the onions turn light brown.
4. Stir in the chicken stock and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Divide soup among bowls, top each serving with croutons and cheese.
7. Place under a hot broiler until the cheese melts and begins to brown slightly.
